name: Lowe's Companies, Inc.
description: Lowe's Companies, Inc. is a prominent American retail company specializing in home improvement. Headquartered in Mooresville, North Carolina, the company operates a vast chain of retail stores across the United States, serving approximately 20 million customers each week. As a FORTUNE 50 organization, Lowe's provides a comprehensive range of products and services for home maintenance, repair, and renovation projects. The company is dedicated to helping customers improve their living spaces through a wide selection of building materials, home decor, appliances, and professional-grade tools, maintaining a strong commitment to community support and customer service excellence.
